'''Apliria''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Safe world/Legends|safe world]]<ref name="AIR" /> in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Deeve]] conducted much of the preliminary [[Scout/Legends|scouting]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] during the course of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="AIR" />

{{Planet-stub}}
